subject: docs(claude-md): add Theme & Dark Mode to Suggested Implementations
body:
Add comprehensive Theme & Dark Mode pattern covering:
- CSS variable palette with semantic tokens (raw hex, v3/v4 compatible)
- Tailwind dark mode config for both v3 (darkMode: 'class') and v4
  (@custom-variant dark)
- useDarkMode web hook with localStorage persistence, system preference
  fallback, safe storage access (try/catch for sandboxed iframes)
- Flash prevention inline script in index.html (same early-capture
  pattern as PWA beforeinstallprompt)
- Dual meta theme-color tags with media queries
- React Native useAppTheme context with AsyncStorage persistence
- themeHydrated flag to prevent splash screen hiding before stored
  preference loads (fixes flash bug found in few-lap audit)
- color-scheme: dark on html.dark for native form elements
- Print override forcing light colors
- Related patterns: currentColor SVGs, chart theme-awareness,
  content themes vs app dark mode distinction
- 13 Key Lessons covering all edge cases and gotchas

Findings from double-check audit:
- localStorage needs try/catch (SecurityError in sandboxed iframes)
- theme() function deprecated in Tailwind v4 (use raw hex)
- textTertiary contrast values were swapped (fixed to pass WCAG AA)
- AsyncStorage hydration flash in React Native (hold splash screen)
- No CSS transitions on switch (industry standard: instant)
- CSP inline script caveat documented
- Android PWA manifest theme_color override documented

Tags: documentation, ui, dark-mode, accessibility, cross-project
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: cross-project-alignment
Semver: minor
